prestazioni: Upgrade the AJ-V8 Gen III 5.0L Supercharged (engine code: AJ133S) with a Harrop HTV2300 supercharger pulley kit (74mm) paired with a custom heat exchanger from PWR Performance (part #PWR-XF50R) to reduce intake temps by 25°C under sustained boost, enabling a 620hp/580lb-ft output on 98 RON fuel with a bespoke ECU remap by Viezu Technologies (Stage 2+ tune, file #XFR-5.0S-2023V2).

Install a full titanium exhaust system from Milltek Sport (part #JAG-XFR-TI-200C) featuring 3.5" downpipes with 200-cell catalytic converters, a valved center section, and 4.5" quad outlets, reducing backpressure by 40% while maintaining OEM emissions compliance (Euro 6d-TEMP).

Replace the OEM ZF 8HP70 transmission with a reinforced unit from Transtar Racing (part #ZF-8HP70-XFR) featuring a billet torque converter (stall speed: 3,200 RPM), upgraded clutches (friction material: ZF Sintered Bronze), and a custom TCU tune by Alientech (file #KessV2-XFR-8HP70-2023) for 0.15s faster shifts and 800Nm torque capacity.
estetica: Fit a full carbon fiber widebody kit from Prior Design (PD-XFR-WB) with extended front fenders (+30mm), rear quarter panels (+40mm), and a custom front splitter with integrated air curtains (CFRP pre-preg, autoclave-cured) to improve aero balance by 12%.

Install a set of forged 21x10.5" (front) and 21x12.5" (rear) wheels from BBS (model: FI-R, offset: ET25 front/ET15 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30 R21 front, 325/25 R21 rear) with custom camber plates from H&R (part #H&R-00852-2) for -3.5° front and -2.8° rear alignment.

Replace the OEM headlights with a full LED adaptive unit from LUX Automotive (part #LUX-JAG-XFR-V2) featuring CREE XHP70.2 LEDs (6,500K), sequential turn signals, and a custom DRL signature with integrated carbon fiber housing, paired with a Morimoto XB35 HID projector retrofit for the high beams.
